04\074\075\105\061\061";"\080\118\099\066\075\104\052\087\116\074\104\077\080\054\087\065";"\101\068\097\048\085\067\083\078\048\073\069\049\122\085\061\061";"\102\043\108\103";"\107\047\111\057\080\052\078\078\049\069\105\061","\099\066\106\115","\109\065\047\104\075\108\051\121\109\047\061\061","\071\069\084\070\083\047\122\111","\104\085\061\061","\118\048\072\066\079\077\105\118\072\055\061\061","\098\047\113\110\073\087\088\054\113\120\047\061","\107\055\061\061";"\121\074\085\122";"\102\049\070\077\097\073\050\107\078\056\066\104\105\073\098\061";"\075\087\048\115\100\055\061\061","\116\047\068\074\048\105\061\061";"\084\085\061\061";"";"\113\099\118\084";"\120\098\056\051";"\116\110\108\102\068\052\084\110\067\052\101\061";"\112\084\098\072\081\110\114\117\068\085\061\061";"\121\113\086\051\118\047\061\061","\072\051\088\075\068\112\054\101","\099\084\072\051\088\084\071\090\097\084\101\061";"\075\118\087\077\053\114\050\051","\088\085\061\061";"\072\080\081\117\055\122\057\110\079\099\057\047\070\075\071\108\112\056\102\049\080\118\117\061";"\067\118\077\103\075\055\061\061","\085\109\076\071\078\047\061\061";"\057\090\047\074\120\078\107\053\090\118\078\061","\077\103\120\117","\079\120\050\110\057\055\078\116\085\069\085\061","\104\052\055\077\072\085\112\120\115\069\082\106\101\077\067\061","\066\073\080\066\111\087\085\049\084\067\083\071";"\057\115\112\106\115\054\097\052\122\066\119\072\049\101\055\102\110\101\052\111\115\076\075\084\108\047\079\057\080\109\057\099\106\099\097\073";"\081\120\055\110\112\056\116\069\105\076\101\061","\090\086\082\103\106\108\113\108\047\051\057\066\101\086\106\122";"\074\082\070\116","\050\049\079\118\083\105\061\061","\109\100\055\078\074\106\117\061","\050\117\075\049\075\074\070\057\115\080\070\103\101\117\117\061","\109\047\061\061","\078\073\077\107\105\098\104\078\053\052\083\111\097\049\088\100\053\043\057\061";"\120\086\114\100\111\115\108\072\086\089\065\074\066\073\050\074\088\099\043\053\069\055\061\061","\12 \121\067\113\106\070","\104\084\056\086\105\105\061\061","\116\070\083\122\103\085\061\061","\056\054\090\052\047\110\048\079\070\113\085\061";"\099\099\073\053","\116\048\101\080\074\051\115\073\111\069\072\089\071\110\081\071\076\056\106\113\065\085\061\061","\069\117\090\111\068\075\076\066\067\057\089\047\055\075\106\078\043\067\089\121\104\110\055\061";"\080\055\061\061";"\065\102\053\113";"\105\116\066\119\053\056\050\117\110\103\088\104\075\116\105\061";"\097\086\052\061";"\078\066\052\106","\100\074\117\108\114\049\056\057","\056\087\099\073\078\055\061\061","\078\099\065\100\069\077\122\110\085\114\066\100\099\048\121\117\113\068\110\072\043\098\055\061";"\097\086\070\101\073\112\073\117\077\079\104\073","\072\089\115\057";"\088\122\087\066","\084\053\065\110\098\055\061\061","\073\109\065\049\066\084\100\074\076\066\110\090";"\115\086\110\100\102\116\050\077\105\073\077\103\115\118\053\102","\068\054\071\114\106\116\102\114\119\111\079\117\085\119\076\071\079\101\078\061";"\075\056\070\120\097\103\084\061","\085\049\104\080\068\054\065\098\115\055\120\114\086\121\098\061";"\106\118\049\054\110\051\074\113\055\100\066\100\081\122\115\083","\076\088\117\112\065\088\069\115\053\078\078\122\077\050\089\120\072\104\043\106\054\105\061\061","\102\073\070\049\105\098\104\115\101\049\066\080\101\104\085\118";"\043\118\121\082\083\106\116\103\116\072\047\061";"\087\048\101\073\053\065\113\119\053\085\061\061","\052\080\066\112\121\121\100\052","\054\112\088\052\114\086\110\086\069\080\099\106\116\057\076\084","\072\078\113\052\069\081\121\109\052\117\085\061","\079\048\068\079\055\075\084\066\122\113\070\115\085\098\075\079\081\105\061\061"}local function i(i)return X[i+(609170+-551393)]end for i,A in ipairs({{142690+-142689;-401487-(-402272)};{-694377-(-694378);-104468+105075},{79422+-78814,640214-639429}})do while A[680953+-680952]<A[-846502+846504]do X[A[241532+-241531]],X[A[681690+-681688]],A[-724739+724740],A[82002-82000]=X[A[-233213-(-233215)]],X[A[140671-140670]],A[-449735+449736]+(-702611+702612),A[-990723+990725]-(-509019+509020)end end do local i=string.sub local A=table.concat local o=math.floor local end,{},function(X,i)local o=V(i)local E=function(E,g,s,Z)return A(X,{E,g;s;Z},i,o)end return E end,function(A,E,g,s)local
